name: DPA Group N.V.
summary: DPA Group N.V. provides professionals secondment, consultancy, and recruitment services. The company offers professional services in the banking and insurance, compliance and risk, engineering, facility, finance and control, IT, legal, marketing, privacy and information security, procurement, recruitment and sales, social domain, supply chain and logistic, and tax fields. DPA Group N.V. was founded in 1990 and is based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.
